name: Battle VS Spamton NEO from DELTARUNE
description:
TIME TO MAKE A VERY [Special] DEAL...

Face the corrupted salesman-turned-cyber-nightmare, SPAMTON NEO. Once just a broken [[Little Sponge]] chasing [[Big Shot]] dreams, he struck a [DEAL] too good to refuse. Now powered by stolen wires and shattered hopes, he’ll show you his [[TRUE POWER]]. The strings are cut, the lights are on, and his voice echoes through the [[Dark Web]]...

In this bot, you start with the standard weapon from the second chapter. I'm not sure if there's a stronger one, but it should suffice. It's recommended to follow a structured format like "on my turn I hit, on Susie's turn I command Rude Buster, on Ralsei's turn I command heal." However, feel free to write as you please. Given the many calculations involved, I highly suggest using proxies with large models (such as DeepSeek). Also, here you play as Kris, so it's best to put an empty character in the persona. The combat mechanics are taken from my other bot, Super Fight Simulator.

This bot is the second in a series of Deltarune boss bots. Future plans include Snowgrave Spanton, Tenna, and the Hammer of Justice. Enjoy the game!
creator: Jony_pro
